'''Drannik''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]]. It was a member world of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] and was represented in the [[New Republic Senate/Legends|New Republic Senate]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Shield of Lies]]'' {{1stm}}
